# L3 — l2-workload-federation

## Anchors

- `kacho.cloud.iam.v1.FederationExchangeService/Exchange`
- `kacho.cloud.iam.v1.TrustPolicyService/Create`
- `kacho.cloud.iam.v1.TrustPolicyService/Delete`
- `kacho.cloud.iam.v1.TrustPolicyService/Get`
- `kacho.cloud.iam.v1.TrustPolicyService/List`
- `kacho.cloud.iam.v1.TrustPolicyService/Update`

## RPC contract

| RPC | gRPC | REST |
|-----|------|------|
| FederationExchangeService/Exchange | (ExchangeTokenRequest) → ExchangeTokenResponse | POST /iam/v1/federations:exchange |
| TrustPolicyService/Create | (CreateTrustPolicyRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /iam/v1/federation/trustPolicies |
| TrustPolicyService/Delete | (DeleteTrustPolicyRequest) → operation.Operation | DELETE /iam/v1/federation/trustPolicies/{trust_policy_id} |
| TrustPolicyService/Get | (GetTrustPolicyRequest) → FederationTrustPolicy | GET /iam/v1/federation/trustPolicies/{trust_policy_id} |
| TrustPolicyService/List | (ListTrustPoliciesRequest) → ListTrustPoliciesResponse | GET /iam/v1/federation/trustPolicies |
| TrustPolicyService/Update | (UpdateTrustPolicyRequest) → operation.Operation | PATCH /iam/v1/federation/trustPolicies/{trust_policy_id} |

## Call tree

- `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/federation_exchange.Handler).Exchange` — Exchange implements iam.v1.FederationExchangeService.Exchange.
  - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.ExchangeUseCase).Execute` — Execute runs the exchange flow.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/cmd/kacho-iam.federationSAResolverStub).AccountForServiceAccount` — (undocumented — see C4)
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/clients.HydraAPIError).Error` — Error возвращает строковое представление ошибки Hydra Admin API.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/clients.IDPJWKSCache).GetKey` — GetKey returns the JWK for (issuer, kid), refreshing the JWKS if needed.
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/clients.JWKSCacheEntry).findKey` — findKey returns the JWK with matching `kid`, or zero+false.
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/clients.JWKSCacheEntry).fresh` — fresh reports whether the entry is within its TTL.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/clients.s3Error).Error` — Error возвращает текст ошибки S3.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.AuditEmitterAdapter).Emit` — Emit append-only пишет audit event.
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.AuditEmitterAdapter).Emit$1` — (undocumented — see C4)
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.AuditOutboxRepo).InsertTx` — InsertTx — enqueue audit event atomically с domain mutation (caller controls TX).
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.CAEPEmitterAdapter).Emit` — Emit append-only пишет CAEP event.
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.CAEPEmitterAdapter).Emit$1` — (undocumented — see C4)
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.CAEPOutboxRepo).InsertTx` — InsertTx — enqueue CAEP-события атомарно с domain mutation (caller владеет TX); status по умолчанию 'pending'.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.FederationJtiReplayRepo).Claim` — Claim atomically records (jti, issuer) as consumed.
      - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.mapErr` — mapErr — repo-side хелпер: завернуть pgconn.PgError в sentinel-семейство.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.FederationRateLimitRepo).TryConsume` — TryConsume atomically decrements one token from the (issuer, bucket_start) bucket; returns ErrRateLimited when the bucket is exhausted.
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.rowAdapter).Scan` — (undocumented — see C4)
      - `(github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.rowAdapter).Scan` — Scan делегирует вызов pgx.Rows.Scan, позволяя использовать rowAdapter там, где ожидается pgx.Row-совместимый scanner.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.FederationTrustPolicyRepo).FindActiveForExchange` — FindActiveForExchange returns the first enabled, not-expired policy that matches (issuer, audience).
      - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.scanFTP` — scanFTP — маппинг строки federation_trust_policies в domain.FederationTrustPolicy.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.ExchangeUseCase).deny` — deny logs + emits a denied-audit event + returns the original error.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.HydraTokenMinter).Mint` — Mint requests an access token from Hydra via client_credentials grant.
      - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/clients.nopCloser).Close` — Close — no-op: обёртка над bytes.Reader для re-usable request body.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.JtiReplayRepoAdapter).Claim` — Claim implements JtiReplayClaimer.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.RateLimitRepoAdapter).TryConsume` — TryConsume implements RateLimiter.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.Registry).MatchByIssuer` — MatchByIssuer returns the matching provider for the given issuer or the generic fallback Provider{Name:"oidc-generic"} (any valid HTTPS issuer is accepted at the JWKS-discovery layer; the generic provider does no extra verification beyond what trust-policy claims_filter / subject_pattern already enforce).
      - `(github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.Provider).Match` — Match reports whether this provider owns the supplied issuer URL.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.TrustPolicyReaderAdapter).FindActiveForExchange` — FindActiveForExchange implements TrustPolicyReader.
    - `(github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/cmd/kacho-iam.federationSAResolverStub).AccountForServiceAccount` — AccountForServiceAccount — stub-резолвер: всегда возвращает пустой account_id, чтобы federation-flow не блокировался при отсутствии реального резолвера.
    - `(github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.StringOrArray).Contains` — Contains reports whether `aud` includes the given value.
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.ClaimsAsMap` — ClaimsAsMap parses raw JSON claims into a generic map (for VerifyExtra + AdditionalClaimsFilter equality check).
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.ParseJWT` — ParseJWT splits a compact JWS (3 dot-separated base64url segments) into header + claims + signature, WITHOUT verifying the signature.
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.ProviderAWSSTS$1` — (undocumented — see C4)
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.ProviderGitHubActions$1` — (undocumented — see C4)
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.ProviderGitLabCI$1` — (undocumented — see C4)
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.ValidateTimeClaims` — ValidateTimeClaims checks `nbf <= now <= exp` with a configurable leeway.
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.defaultStr` — defaultStr возвращает s, либо def если s пустая.
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.pickMatchingPolicy` — pickMatchingPolicy iterates candidate policies and returns the first whose subject_pattern matches the subject claim AND whose additional_claims_filter equality holds.
      - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.AdditionalClaimsMatch` — AdditionalClaimsMatch enforces equality of `filter` keys against the parsed claim map.
      - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.matchSubjectPattern` — matchSubjectPattern — exact-eq unless the pattern starts with `^` and ends with `$`, in which case it's compiled as anchored regex.
      - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.parseClaimsFilter` — parseClaimsFilter decodes the JSONB filter; empty/null → empty map.
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.verifyWithJWK` — verifyWithJWK selects the correct verifier (RSA/ECDSA) based on jwk.Kty.
      - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/clients.JWKToECDSAPublicKey` — JWKToECDSAPublicKey converts an EC JWK (kty=EC) into *ecdsa.PublicKey.
      - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/clients.JWKToRSAPublicKey` — JWKToRSAPublicKey converts an RSA JWK (kty=RSA) into *rsa.PublicKey.
      - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.VerifyECDSA` — VerifyECDSA verifies an ES{256,384,512} signature against the supplied public key.
      - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/service/federation.VerifyRSA` — VerifyRSA verifies an RS{256,384,512} signature against the supplied public key.
  - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/federation_exchange.mapErr` — mapErr maps service-layer sentinels to gRPC status codes per acceptance §6.
- `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.Handler).Create` — Create implements TrustPolicyService.Create.
  - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.CreateTrustPolicyUseCase).Execute` — Execute returns a started Operation; the actual INSERT happens in a worker.
    - `(github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/domain.FederationTrustPolicy).Validate` — Validate — sync-проверка FederationTrustPolicy: id/issuer/subject_pattern, длина audience, диапазон max_token_ttl и инварианты expires_at.
      - `(github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/domain.FederationTrustPolicyID).Validate` — Validate — FederationTrustPolicyID: формат `^ftp_<17-crockford>$`.
      - `(github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/domain.OIDCIssuer).Validate` — Validate — OIDCIssuer: длина 1..512 + обязательный `https://` префикс.
      - `(github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/domain.SubjectPattern).Validate` — Validate — SubjectPattern: непустое значение, длина <=512, без wildcard `*`.
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.buildConditionsJSON` — buildConditionsJSON encodes a `condition_ids` list as a JSONB object `{"condition_ids":[...]}`.
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.validateCreate` — validateCreate проверяет обязательные поля и ограничения CreateInput (audience, max_token_ttl ≤ 15m, expires_at и т.п.).
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/domain.NewKac127ID` — NewKac127ID возвращает идентификатор формата `<prefix>_<17-char crockford>`.
  - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.operationToProto` — operationToProto — convert corelib Operation to proto envelope.
- `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.Handler).Delete` — Delete implements TrustPolicyService.Delete.
  - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.DeleteTrustPolicyUseCase).Execute` — Execute returns a started Operation.
- `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.Handler).Get` — Get implements TrustPolicyService.Get.
  - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.GetTrustPolicyUseCase).Execute` — Execute returns the policy.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.FederationTrustPolicyRepo).Get` — Get читает FederationTrustPolicy по id; отсутствие строки → ErrNotFound.
      - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/errors.Wrapf` — Wrapf — стандартный fmt.Errorf-style обёртка с явным sentinel.
  - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.mapPGErr` — mapPGErr — maps repo sentinels to gRPC status codes for handler.
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/errors.StripSentinel` — StripSentinel — извлекает «полезную» часть сообщения (после «sentinel: »), чтобы handler-слой показал клиенту verbatim YC text без internal prefix (parity с kacho-vpc/internal/handler/mapping.go::stripSentinel).
  - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.policyToProto` — policyToProto конвертирует domain.FederationTrustPolicy в proto-сообщение.
    - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.extractConditionIDs` — extractConditionIDs reverse op of buildConditionsJSON.
- `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.Handler).List` — List implements TrustPolicyService.List.
  - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.ListTrustPoliciesUseCase).Execute` — Execute returns paged policies.
    - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/repo/kacho/pg.FederationTrustPolicyRepo).List` — List returns policies for the given SA ordered by created_at ASC, paged by id.
- `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.Handler).Update` — Update implements TrustPolicyService.Update.
  - `(*github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.UpdateTrustPolicyUseCase).Execute` — Execute returns a started Operation.
  - `github.com/PRO-Robotech/kacho-iam/internal/apps/kacho/api/trust_policy.hasPath` — hasPath сообщает, присутствует ли путь want в списке update_mask.
